gauge.name: Russian River at Digger Bend NR Healdsburg

impacts.statement: Major Flooding.  Left bank (east side of river) point bar completely submerged.  City of Healdsburg well field heads and highest point bar roadbeds at or below water level.  Adjacent floodplain inundated on both sides of river and private residences nearby threatened by flood water or are already flooded.
Moderate Flooding.  Right bank (west side) levee and Healdsburg well field foundations inundated.  NWS will issue a Flash Flood Warning, if not yet already issued.
Minor Flooding. Lowest floodplain roads on either side of river inundated. NWS will issue an Urban/Small Stream Advisory, if not yet issued.

Monitor stage.  Adjacent low-lying vineyard on right bank side (west side) inundated and lowest point bar channels on east (left bank) side activated.  NWS will issue a Flash Flood Watch, if not yet already issued.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States

Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Graphical forecasts are not available during times of high water, forecast crest information can be found in the local WFO web page.
